entry.title: New: RES25-083 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF UP TO $1,700 TO THE CITY FROM THE U.S. GOVERNMENT ACCOUNTABILITY OFFICE ("GAO") FOR TRAVEL AND RELATED EXPENSES FOR ONE STAFF MEMBER FROM THE OFFICE OF THE CITY AUDITOR TO ATTEND THE U.S COMPTROLLER GENERAL'S ANNUAL DOMESTIC WORKING GROUP MEETING.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
